# imageIdentifier

**Type**

A unique identifier for an image that you provide when you upload the image.

## Declaration

```swift
uuid imageIdentifier
```

## Discussion

You create a UUID to identify an image when you call [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Upload-Image]. Use this identifier to refer to the same image throughout the API.

## Images

- **imageState**: The approval state of an image.
- **altText**: The alternative text for a corresponding image.
